series_metadata.series_description: Record consists of BMV Forms 2725A (Notice of Suspension), 2724 (Report of Drug Offense Conviction), and any supporting documents in accordance with chapter 2925 of the O.R.C., Suspensions range in length from 6 months to 5 years.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Hard copies destroyed after they are imaged. ; Electronic: Effective December 2001, all In-State Drug Cases are maintained on the Optic Image System for fifty (50) years., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
